channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 55/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 6.5%.

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I will never understand how Keir reconciles his self-conception as a good man doing a good job as prime minister with “my premiership had to be brought to the brink of death for me to say this”.
item.description: I will never understand how Keir reconciles his self-conception as a good man doing a good job as prime minister with “my premiership had to be brought to the brink of death for me to say this”.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Burnham handed two major boosts in bid to return as MP and challenge Starmer
item.description: Politics latest: Burnham handed two major boosts in bid to return as MP and challenge Starmer

item.title: Independent UK Politics: ‘Starmer is doing nothing, but Burnham is for the people’: Makerfield voters pin their hopes on the ‘King of the North’
item.description: ‘Starmer is doing nothing, but Burnham is for the people’: Makerfield voters pin their hopes on the ‘King of the North’

item.title: The Times: Rivals told to skip leadership contest if Andy Burnham wins by-election - The Times
item.description: Rivals told to skip leadership contest if Andy Burnham wins by-election - The Times

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Can Andy Burnham actually beat Reform in Makerfield to take on Starmer? Here’s what the data shows
item.description: Can Andy Burnham actually beat Reform in Makerfield to take on Starmer? Here’s what the data shows

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘Why are we even doing this?’ The week that left Britain’s PM looking like an interim leader
item.description: ‘Why are we even doing this?’ The week that left Britain’s PM looking like an interim leader

item.title: i Politics: Farage vs Burnham: The tactics Reform will use in crunch by-election
item.description: Farage vs Burnham: The tactics Reform will use in crunch by-election

item.title: The Guardian: ‘An hour of abuse’: Jeremy Corbyn on Labour coups, and whether he feels sorry for Starmer - The Guardian
item.description: ‘An hour of abuse’: Jeremy Corbyn on Labour coups, and whether he feels sorry for Starmer - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘An hour of abuse’: Jeremy Corbyn on Labour coups, and whether he feels sorry for Starmer
item.description: ‘An hour of abuse’: Jeremy Corbyn on Labour coups, and whether he feels sorry for Starmer

item.title: i Politics: Burnham to U-turn on demand to reverse Brexit during by-election, allies say
item.description: Burnham to U-turn on demand to reverse Brexit during by-election, allies say
